---
title: "03_lz_home-location_coverage"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Join Mapp2 user counts with census population

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
input_mapp2 <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/inputs/mapp2/locations-origin/msoa/location-origin-count_msoa.csv"
input_census <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/inputs/census/census2021-ts/combined-data-msoa.csv"
output_dir <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS/data/outputs/mapp2/census-month/populations/active-population-bias"
output_file <- file.path(output_dir, "location-origin-count_msoa_joined.csv")

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
df_mapp2 <- read_csv(input_mapp2, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  select(MSOA21CD, pop_dfd) %>%
  rename(user_count = pop_dfd)

df_census <- read_csv(input_census, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  select(date, geography.code, geography, total_residents) %>%
  rename(
    name = geography,
    population = total_residents
  )

df_joined <- df_mapp2 %>%
  left_join(df_census, by = c("MSOA21CD" = "geography.code")) %>%
  select(date, MSOA21CD, name, population, user_count)

write_csv(df_joined, output_file)

df_joined
```

```{r}
output_file
```
